layout.layout_rhythm: biennale-yellow: medium density, high formality. Solar yellow on warm parchment with deep indigo serif and atmospheric sun-glow gradients.

template_json_typography.style: transitional Didone-flavored display serif paired with a clean grotesk sans for micro-typography and a mono for tabular data

design_tokens_typography.style: transitional Didone-flavored display serif paired with a clean grotesk sans for micro-typography and a mono for tabular data

typography.typography_role: transitional Didone-flavored display serif paired with a clean grotesk sans for micro-typography and a mono for tabular data

cjk_policy.known_degradation: **No CDN-loadable Chinese monospace face for tabular data.** JetBrains Mono's role here (calendar ledger dates, chart year/value labels, page numbers) depends on monospaced figure rhythm that CJK doesn't provide. 思源黑体 at weight 500 with `font-feature-settings: "tnum"` gives tabular Latin digits but Chinese characters remain proportional. For ledger rows wher

template_json_palette.description: warm parchment ground with a signature solar-yellow accent, deep indigo navy ink, and a soft peach/ember edge that bleeds out of corner gradients

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Instrument Serif 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Serif Pro 与 思源宋体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Archivo 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

source_fonts.raw_value: 'Smiley Sans Oblique', 'Noto Serif SC', serif` on the display tokens that should carry the strongest poster register. ### Universal CJK Adjustments - **Line-height**: increase by ~15–25% from the Latin spec. Body 1.75–1.85 (up from 1.5–1.55), display 1.05–1.15 (up from the very tight 0.84–0.96 used on Instrument Serif). The Latin display tokens here use line-height as low as 0.84 — at that compression, CJK characters collide vertically. Open display to a minimum of 1.0 for Chinese, and 1.15+ on

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

text_decoration_policy.underline.color.raw_value: ights - **1px solid `{colors.ink}`** — the universal rule. Used for header-band underlines, ledger row separators, footer-column tops, and the bordered chart bar accent on the lit row. - **1px solid `rgba(27, 37, 102, 0.18-0.2)`** — soft variant of the same rule. Used for secondary row separators in

italic.raw_value: ment Serif — a contemporary high-contrast serif with tall ascenders and elegant italics — paired with Archivo for sans-serif chrome and JetBrains Mono for numerical and metadata callouts. No drop shadows, no rounded corners, no bordered cards: the only structural lines are hairline 1px rules in ink.
